metadata.title: ProposalAction — single execution step within a Proposal

description: A single execution step within a Proposal. References exactly one of AtomicAction (via action_id) or Flow (via flow_id) — the XOR invariant is enforced by __post_init__ at runtime. The ref_id and ref_kind properties derive from whichever is set. Governed as a sub-object of Proposal (src/will/autonomy/proposal.py). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1.

action_id.description: AtomicAction identifier from ActionRegistry (str | None). Mutually exclusive with flow_id. e.g. 'fix.format'. Null when flow_id is set.

flow_id.description: Flow identifier from FlowRegistry (str | None). Mutually exclusive with action_id. e.g. 'flow.fix_code'. Null when action_id is set.

parameters.description: Parameters passed to the action or flow at execution time. Must include write: true for mutating actions.

order.description: Execution order within the Proposal. Zero-indexed.

allOf.description: XOR invariant: if action_id is non-null, flow_id must be null. Enforced by ProposalAction.__post_init__ at runtime.
XOR invariant (inverse): if flow_id is non-null, action_id must be null. Enforced by ProposalAction.__post_init__ at runtime.
